name: Blaize Holdings, Inc.
business: Blaize develops purpose-built AI-enabled computing solutions comprised of proprietary hardware and software, and complementary third-party hardware solutions. Its computing solutions are designed for efficient processing of AI inference workloads across edge and data center environments. The company also delivers third-party hardware solutions, primarily servers, that host its proprietary technology.

exposures.sentence: We have created an AI computing accelerator, the GSP.
Our computing solutions are designed for efficient processing of AI inference workloads across edge and data center environments.
Our computing solutions are designed for efficient processing of AI inference workloads across edge and data center environments.
We outsource all of our manufacturing in relation to our AI chips and PCIe cards.
This processor has been designed from the ground up for compute-intensive data parallel workloads, such as computer vision, machine learning, and AI applications.
Our partnerships with certain automotive OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers are long-term in nature, and we will not receive firm purchase order commitments until we deliver our automotive-grade chip.

We may conduct a portion of our business with third-party ecosystem partners to provide defensive solutions that incorporate our products to various foreign and domestic government agencies, which are subject to unique risks.
